description.value:
[1 action] Archetype, Auditory, Concentrate, Emotion, Fear, Mental

You loose a bone-chilling howl that shatters nerve and breaks morale. All creatures within 60 feet must attempt a Will save (your class DC). Creatures immune to fear are unaffected.

ResultEffect
Critical SuccessNo effect
SuccessFrightened 1
FailureFrightened 2
Critical FailureFrightened 2 and Fleeing for 1 round

Suppressed while Sea-Bound.
